name: JEPA + AdamW TTT + Full GPTQ + FA3 + LZMA + XSA-All
blurb: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) auxiliary training signal + AdamW test-time training (pre-quantization, 3 epochs, cosine decay) + Full Hessian GPTQ int6 quantization + Flash-Attention 3 + LZMA compression + XSA on all 11 layers + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + BigramHash(2048) + SmearGate + EMA. Built from scratch with multi-AI collaboration (Claude, Codex, Gemini). Self-funded independent research across servers worldwide. Seed 1337, single run: 1.1085 BPB. 15,977,978 bytes total (under 16MB).
author: NewyorkDev
